ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algo_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the algorithm (e.g., O(n), O(n log n), etc.) */,
  "implementation_language" TEXT /* Implementation language or framework of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "init_modes" (
  "init_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initialization mode */,
  "init_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the initialization mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initialization mode */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters or settings of the initialization mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("init_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computational size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Value of the computational size */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the size value (e.g., bytes, kilobytes, megabytes, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the computational size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "processes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number of processes */,
  "processes_value" INTEGER /* Value of the number of processes */,
  "processor_type" TEXT /* Type of processor or processing unit used (e.g., CPU, GPU, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the number of processes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processes_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "algo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used */,
  "init_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initialization mode */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computational size */,
  "processes_id" INTEGER /* ID of the number of processes */,
  "init_time" REAL /* Initialization time in seconds */,
  "funct_time" REAL /* Function execution time in seconds */,
  "user_time" REAL /* User time in seconds */,
  "elapsed_time" REAL /* Elapsed time in seconds */,
  "sys_time" REAL /* System time in seconds */,
  "pCPU" REAL /* Percentage of CPU usage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage in MB */,
  "num_iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations or runs performed */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the performance metrics */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_processes_id FOREIGN KEY ("processes_id") REFERENCES processes ("processes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algo_id FOREIGN KEY ("algo_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_init_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("init_mode_id") REFERENCES init_modes ("init_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format or type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON, etc.) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-metric association */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system resource entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage in MB */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency in ms */,
  "system_architecture" TEXT /* System architecture or configuration (e.g., 32-bit, 64-bit, multi-core, etc.) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system or platform (e.g., Windows, Linux, macOS, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_resources_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
